name: Healthco Healthcare And Wellness Reit
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$0.6908. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.6975 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.6908, stop A$0.6385, target A$0.7150. Risk/reward is 0.46:1.
